title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
